notes: Case 2004-13 (Complaint of TE Wayne Zaepfel vs. Central Carolina Presbytery) was docketed in 2004 and appears listed in GA 33 (2005) as pending (awaiting final determination by SJC in October 2005). In GA 34 (2006), case 2004-13 is reported as abandoned. No judicial opinion or decision text was issued; the case appears only as a docket entry in the SJC case list. A separate but related case, 2005-13 (Appeal of TE Wayne Zaepfel vs. Central Carolina Presbytery), was subsequently filed.
